title: Genware Millenium Cutlery Soda Spoons, 2000-9, Pack of 12
description: Product Description Genware Millennium Cutlery Range GenWare products are manufactured to provide the robustness and durability required for maximum performance in the hospitality and food service industry. We want you to be confident in your purchase and gain the maximum life and value from your GenWare products.
